display.label: The list of TimescaleDB data schemas
display.description: Comma-separated list schema names that contain TimescaleDB data tables, defaults to: '_timescaledb_internal' Default: _timescaledb_internal

display.label: The prefix of TimescaleDB topic names
display.description: The namespace (prefix) of topics where TimescaleDB events will be routed, defaults to: '_timescaledb_internal' Default: timescaledb
